components.desc: Script/module that scans repo state (same sources make progress reads: task lists, checkmarks, build artifacts) and gathers raw counts into internal structures. Self-test: run against fixture dir, assert expected counts.

Define stable JSON schema for progress output (fields: totals, per-section counts, percent, timestamp, version). Ship as schema file + example doc. Self-test: validate example against schema with a validator one-liner.
Serializer that converts collector output into schema-conformant JSON, printed to stdout. Self-test: pipe output to schema validation + json parse check.
Makefile target `progress-json` invoking emitter, exit 0 on success, machine-readable stdout only (no log noise). Self-test: `make progress-json | python -m json.tool` in CI script.
Non-interactive test comparing numbers from `make progress` human output vs `make progress-json` fields to guarantee both stay in sync. Self-test: run both, parse, assert equality.
